site.name: Mohetios.dev
site.description: A technical notebook for software, product engineering, open-source work, and the practice of building useful systems.
site.footer: Built slowly. Written honestly. Kept open.

items.smallUseful: Build small, useful things before giving them large names.
items.preservePath: Write the path, not only the polished result.
items.clearInterfaces: Prefer clear interfaces, stable tools, and honest constraints.
items.openWorkshop: Keep the work open enough to be reviewed, forked, and improved.

validation.name: Please enter your name.

form.name: Name
form.messagePlaceholder: Tell me what you are building, what you need, and what kind of collaboration you have in mind.
form.privacyNote: Your message goes directly to my private inbox. No newsletter, no automated marketing.

success.title: Message received.
success.description: Thanks for reaching out. I will review the context and reply if there is a clear fit.

error.title: Message could not be sent.
error.description: Please try again in a moment.
error.migration: The contact inbox table is missing. Apply the latest database migration.
error.verificationDescription: Please complete the verification before sending your message.

sidebar.label: Open for thoughtful work
sidebar.title: Useful context helps me reply better.
sidebar.description: A clear message about the problem, product, timeline, and expected role is more useful than a generic intro.

work.title: Best fit
work.description: Product engineering, frontend architecture, AI workflows, dashboards, and practical technical writing.

response.title: Response style
response.description: I prioritize specific messages with real context over broad or automated outreach.
